subject: Fetch Phase 2: route refetch_tile + fetch_4frame_scenes through fetch_tile_spectral; delete race-pool
description: Phase 2 of the fetch single-canonical-entry consolidation. Route scripts/fetch_unified_tiles.py::refetch_tile (~:1127) and imint/training/tile_fetch.py::fetch_4frame_scenes (~:326) through imint/training/fetch_spectral.py::fetch_tile_spectral, and DELETE the _fetch_frames_from_best_dates race-pool (scripts/fetch_unified_tiles.py ~:322-477). Verify: bit-equivalence on the DES arm (mock the inner fetch, like test_full_contract) + integration. Phase 3 (halo+M2+DES data change) is human-gated and out of scope here.
